errors: Age threshold mismatch (ELM: 25, CPG: 18); time interval mismatch (ELM: 6 months, CPG: 12 months)
Age threshold mismatch (ELM: 80, CPG: 85)
HbA1c threshold mismatch (ELM: 9%, CPG: 6.5%)

Smoking history criteria incomplete in ELM. CPG requires 20 pack-year history and quitting within 15 years for former smokers, but ELM only checks for "Tobacco User" value set existence without pack-year or quit duration logic.
Age threshold mismatch (ELM: 60, CPG: 45); time interval mismatch (ELM: 2 years, CPG: 1 year)
Time interval mismatch (ELM: 6 months, CPG: 1 year)

Age threshold mismatch (ELM: >=30, CPG: 15-65); missing upper age limit check (ELM does not verify Age <=65); rationale mismatch (ELM: null when InPopulation=true, CPG: "USPSTF recommends..." when InPopulation=true)
BMI threshold mismatch (ELM: 35 kg/m², CPG: 25 kg/m²); time interval mismatch (ELM: 1 year, CPG: 3 years)

Age threshold mismatch (ELM: 30, CPG: 21 for lower bound). The ELM implementation defines "In Demographic" as age >= 30 years, but the CPG requires age >= 21 years for inclusion in the target population. This creates an exclusion of women aged 21-29 who are explicitly included in the CPG.
Time interval mismatch for recent depression screening (ELM: 3 months, CPG: 1 year)
Age threshold mismatch (ELM: 75, CPG: 65)
Age threshold mismatch (ELM: 25, CPG: 18)
Time interval mismatch for DEXA scan lookback period (ELM: 6 months, CPG: 2 years)
Age threshold mismatch (ELM: 55-75 years, CPG: 65-75 years)
Logical operator mismatch in MeetsInclusionCriteria (ELM uses OR between Screening Age and Gender, but CPG requires AND for both criteria to be met).

Logical structure mismatch. The ELM's "Needs Tobacco Use Screening" only includes the age check (>=18 years) but does not incorporate the exclusion of recent tobacco screening (lookback 1 year). The CPG requires both conditions (age >=18 AND no recent screening) to determine InPopulation. The ELM's "InPopulation" is incorrectly defined as [Needs Tobacco Use Screening], which lacks the exclusion of recent screening.
Age threshold mismatch (ELM: Age >= 50, CPG: Age 50-80); Smoking history criteria missing pack-year and 15-year quit requirements in ELM; Upper age limit (80) not enforced in ELM logic.
Missing exclusion of active Bipolar Diagnosis in Needs Depression Screening logic; Missing check for Qualifying Encounter in Inclusion Criteria.

Logical inversion in Colonoscopy exclusion criteria (ELM checks for presence of colonoscopy in past 1 month, but CPG requires absence of colonoscopy in past 1 month). The ELM uses `COUNT(...) > 0` for Colonoscopy, but should use `COUNT(...) = 0` to match CPG's "no screening needed if colonoscopy exists within past 1 month" exclusion.

Logical structure mismatch (ELM: "Needs Falls Prevention Screening" = In Demographic AND Has Recent Falls Assessment; CPG requires In Demographic AND NOT Has Recent Falls Assessment). This inverts the exclusion criteria, leading to incorrect screening eligibility determination.

Logical structure mismatch in exclusion criteria (ELM uses NOT (Has Bipolar AND Has Depression) instead of NOT Has Bipolar AND NOT Has Depression); Missing encounter requirement (2.16.840.1.113883.3.600.1916) in inclusion criteria.

Logical operator mismatch in exclusion criteria (ELM uses AND, CPG requires OR for exclusion conditions: Connective Tissue Disorders OR Amiodarone therapy). This would incorrectly exclude patients only if both exclusions are met, violating the CPG requirement to exclude patients meeting either exclusion criterion.
Value set mismatch for "Alcohol Use Screening" (ELM: 2.16.840.1.113883.3.526.3.1278 vs CPG: 2.16.840.1.113883.3.600.1542)
